name: Star Cluster NGC 6826
caption: A blinking planetary nebula in the constellation Cygnus.

name: Galaxy NGC 1300
caption: A classic barred spiral galaxy in the constellation Eridanus.

name: Crab Nebula
caption: The remnant of a supernova explosion witnessed in 1054 AD.

name: Orion Nebula
caption: A stellar nursery 1,500 light-years from Earth.

name: Whirlpool Galaxy
caption: A grand-design spiral galaxy interacting with a smaller companion.

name: Ant Nebula
caption: A bipolar nebula with jets of gas streaming from a dying star.

name: Rose Galaxies
caption: Two interacting galaxies resembling a rose, formed by gravity.

name: Pillars of Creation
caption: Towering columns of gas and dust in the Eagle Nebula.

name: Sombrero Galaxy
caption: A galaxy with a bright nucleus and a large central bulge.

name: Butterfly Nebula
caption: A bipolar planetary nebula with delicate wing-like structures.

name: Mystic Mountain
caption: A craggy fantasy mountaintop in the Carina Nebula.

name: Fireworks Galaxy NGC 6946
caption: A spiral galaxy with an unusually high rate of supernovae.

name: Stephan's Quintet
caption: A visual grouping of five galaxies in the constellation Pegasus.

name: Cat's Eye Nebula
caption: A complex planetary nebula with concentric rings of gas.

name: Cartwheel Galaxy
caption: A ring galaxy formed by a head-on collision between galaxies.

name: Helix Nebula
caption: The nearest bright planetary nebula to Earth, in Aquarius.

name: Snowflake Cluster
caption: A young star cluster shaped like a cosmic snowflake.

name: Christmas Tree Cluster
caption: A cluster of young stars resembling a cosmic Christmas tree.
